summary: Completed testing of Quitação (Payment Settlement) and Cadastro (Registration) features. All features working correctly: 1) Quitar modal for Contas a Pagar with data_pagamento and conta_bancaria_id, 2) Quitar modal for Contas a Receber with data_recebimento and conta_bancaria_id, 3) Quitar button appears for 'pendente' and 'em_aberto' status, 4) CadastroFormModal accessible from both Contas a Pagar and Contas a Receber with complete form including CNPJ/CEP lookup.
passed_tests: Backend: Create conta a pagar with pendente status - PASSED
Backend: Quitar conta a pagar with data_pagamento and conta_bancaria_id - PASSED
Backend: Quitar conta a pagar em_aberto - PASSED
Backend: Create conta a receber with pendente status - PASSED
Backend: Quitar conta a receber with data_recebimento and conta_bancaria_id - PASSED
Backend: Create fornecedor cadastro - PASSED
Backend: Create cliente cadastro - PASSED
Backend: List cadastros - PASSED
Backend: List contas bancárias - PASSED
Backend: Status filter for pendente and em_aberto - PASSED
UI: Contas a Pagar page loads correctly - PASSED
UI: Quitar button appears for em_aberto status - PASSED
UI: Quitar modal has 'Data do Pagamento' field - PASSED
UI: Quitar modal has 'Conta Bancária (Saída)' dropdown - PASSED
UI: Nova Conta modal has 'Cadastrar novo fornecedor' button - PASSED
UI: Contas a Receber page loads correctly - PASSED
UI: Quitar Recebimento modal has 'Data do Recebimento' field - PASSED
UI: Quitar Recebimento modal has 'Conta Bancária (Entrada)' dropdown - PASSED
UI: Nova Conta a Receber modal has 'Cadastrar novo cliente' button - PASSED
UI: CadastroFormModal opens with complete form - PASSED
UI: CadastroFormModal has Tipo de Cadastro, Pessoa, Status fields - PASSED
UI: CadastroFormModal has CNPJ lookup button - PASSED
UI: CadastroFormModal has CEP lookup button - PASSED
UI: CadastroFormModal has all address fields - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Quitação endpoints properly save conta_bancaria_id to database
Frontend correctly shows quitar button for both 'pendente' and 'em_aberto' status
CadastroFormModal is reusable component with defaultTipo prop for fornecedor/cliente
CNPJ lookup uses BrasilAPI for automatic data filling
CEP lookup uses ViaCEP for automatic address filling
After cadastro creation, onSuccess callback updates parent form with new name
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested quitação and cadastro features. Quitação modal for Contas a Pagar has 'Data do Pagamento' and 'Conta Bancária (Saída)' fields. Quitação modal for Contas a Receber has 'Data do Recebimento' and 'Conta Bancária (Entrada)' fields. CadastroFormModal is accessible via UserPlus button next to Fornecedor/Cliente dropdown in Nova Conta modals. The modal has complete form with CNPJ/CEP lookup functionality.

fields: Grupo, Rota, Vendedor, Limite de Crédito
